'''Siluria III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Siluria system/Legends|Siluria system]] of the [[Atravis sector/Legends|Atravis sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

{{Planet-stub}}
